twin_relationship: Production-final variant of the Crystal Cutter family. Inherits R28+R29 chained-solver architecture from scenes 10/11; adds multi-seed Init State, 4-null motion hierarchy, 3 decorrelated Random Fields, 4 pre-baked crystal variants alongside the live procedural, and full RS render setup.
spenser_summary: Full production crystal using all of the tutorial methods.
purpose: Production-final Crystal Cutter scene combining the R28+R29 chained-solver foundation (from scenes 10/11) with production extensions: multi-seed Init State, 4-null motion stack, 3 Random Fields per cutter, 4 baked crystal variants, RS render rig, and animated Crystals Rotate null for cinematic camera moves.
delta_vs_scenes_10_11: Init State now contains 3 seed primitives (Sphere + Platonic + Cylinder) — Connect generator union creates a multi-shape seed
4-null motion hierarchy on Corners Cuts cutter (Continuous Spin > Random Spin > Rotate Angle > Move in and out) vs scene 11's 3-null
3 Random Fields per Corners Cuts cutter (Angle + Spin + In and Out) vs scene 11's 2
Pre-baked crystal variants: Crystal1 (5279 pts) / Crystal2 (2904 pts) / Crystal3 (3705 pts) / Crystal4 (5143 pts) as siblings of the live Solved State output
Final wrap: Crystals Rotate (animated null) > Cristal Explode (Fracture 1018791) > {live + 4 baked} for cinematic intercutting
FPS=25, MAX=300 (12 second timeline) with animated camera vs scene 11's high-FPS-iteration-counter style
3 production materials: BG / Bouncecard / Crystal (RS materials, type 5703)
Full RS Camera + lighting rig (4 lights — stripped before analysis per methodology)
scene_nodes_footprint_unchanged: Still just 10 Scene Nodes graph nodes total (2× 5-node memory@ containers). Production complexity lives entirely in classic OM. Confirms minimum-Scene-Nodes-footprint scales to production scenes.
om_classic_generators_added_vs_11: Sphere (5160) + Platonic (5161) added to Init State alongside Cylinder
Random Spin null added between Continuous Spin and Rotate Angle (4-null hierarchy)
Spin Random Field added per Corners Cuts cutter (3rd field)
Crystal1, Crystal2, Crystal3, Crystal4 (5100 PolygonObjects) — pre-baked static variants
Crystals Rotate null wrapping all crystal outputs for animated camera move
Cristal Explode (Fracture 1018791) wrapping live + baked outputs
what_is_clever_additional: Multi-seed Init State (Connect's union of Sphere + Platonic + Cylinder) — different starting morphology per primitive type.
4-null compound motion hierarchy proves N-layer motion control extends arbitrarily; each layer is independent and randomizable.
3 decorrelated Random Fields per cutter give fully independent randomization per motion axis — most organic-feeling cuts.
Baked variants alongside live procedural = production technique. 4 frozen + 1 live = 5 crystals to intercut for cinematic flexibility.
Final Crystal Explode (Fracture 1018791) wraps live + baked outputs for breakup anims and unified rendering.
Scene Nodes footprint stays at 10 nodes despite full production complexity — proves minimum-footprint style scales.

minimal_reproducible_subgraph.name: production_procedural_with_baked_variants
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.purpose: Combine LIVE procedural simulation (R28+R29) with N pre-baked static variants for production rendering. Live keeps tweakability; baked gives speed.
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.structure: R28+R29 base + Connect-multi-seed Init State + N-null motion + M Random Fields + N baked PolygonObject variants + Fracture wrap + Crystals Rotate animated null + RS render rig
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.value_proposition: Bridges procedural flexibility with production rendering speed. Artists tweak parameters via live solver while having pre-rendered archive variants for intercutting. Best of both worlds — no recompute pressure during render.
secondary_recipes: R37_multi_seed_init_state — Connect generator wrapping multiple seed primitives (union seed)
R39_compound_motion_null_chain_arbitrary_depth — N-deep null hierarchy for cutter motion
R40_n_decorrelated_random_fields — M Random Fields per cutter for fully independent motion-axis randomization
blockers_to_recipe_implementation: Bake-procedural-variant tooling needed in cinema4d-mcp (run sim, snapshot output, save as PolygonObject)
Multi-seed Init State Connect-generator setup needs API surface
N-deep motion null hierarchy creation needs API surface
Recipe meta-language for declaring bake-variants count + seeds

lessons_for_cinema4d_mcp: Production-ready procedural = live + N baked variants. Recipe library should have explicit bake-variant tooling.
Multi-seed Init State via Connect's union gives shape diversity from one solver.
Compound motion null hierarchies extend arbitrarily — recipes should support N-deep motion stacks.
Decorrelated Random Fields per motion axis = organic-feel cuts. Recipe should expose field-count parameter.
Minimum-Scene-Nodes-footprint scales to production. Recipes should bias toward minimum-footprint style for artist accessibility.
